diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,164 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: Factory class, createFactory, createMiddleware
+- Reads as: factory.ts
+- Neighbor files: ../hono, ../hono-base, ../http-exception
+- Safe summary: Helper for creating and composing app instances and middleware chains.
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: route.ts
+- Neighbor files: ../context, ../../request/constants, ../../types, ../../utils/url
+- Safe summary: Helper for extracting route-related information from context objects.
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket, WSReadyState, WSContext, WSContextInit, SendOptions, defineWebSocketHelper
+- Reads as: websocket.ts
+- Neighbor files: ../context, ../types, ../utils/http-status
+- Safe summary: Helper for upgrading HTTP connections to WebSocket and managing events.
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
+- Reads as: cookie.ts
+- Neighbor files: ../context, ../../utils/cookie
+- Safe summary: Helper for getting, setting, and deleting cookies including signed ones.
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: testing.ts
+- Neighbor files: ../client, ../context, ../hono, ../types, ../utils/types
+- Safe summary: Helper for creating test clients with custom request interceptors.
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals
+- Reads as: adapter.ts
+- Neighbor files: ../context
+- Safe summary: Helper for detecting runtime environment and accessing environment-specific variables.
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: rawCssString, createCssContext, css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style
+- Reads as: css.ts
+- Neighbor files: ../helper/html, ../jsx/constants, ../jsx/dom/css, ../utils/html
+- Safe summary: Helper for embedding CSS with runtime class name injection using Web API.
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR, DEFAULT_STYLE_ID, rawCssString, minify, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon
+- Reads as: common.ts
+- Neighbor files: ../css
+- Safe summary: Core CSS helper functions with utilities for class name generation and CSS processing.
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy, ALLOWED_TOKEN_PATTERN
+- Reads as: proxy.ts
+- Neighbor files: ../http-exception, ../../utils/headers
+- Safe summary: Helper for proxying requests to another origin with header filtering.
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: dev.ts
+- Neighbor files: ../hono, ../types, ../utils/color, ../utils/handler
+- Safe summary: Development-time helpers for inspecting and displaying application routes.
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: raw, html
+- Reads as: html.ts
+- Neighbor files: ../utils/html
+- Safe summary: Helper for returning HTML content, supports children and callbacks.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssg, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin
+- Reads as: index.ts (re-exports)
+- Neighbor files: ./ssg.ts, ./plugins.ts, ./utils.ts, ./middleware.ts
+- Safe summary: Static Site Generation helper for generating static content from routes.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: generateFilePath, parseResponseContent, determineExtension, combineBeforeRequestHooks, combineAfterResponseHooks, combineAfterGenerateHooks, SSGPlugin, ToSSG, saveContentToFile, fetchRoutesContent, toSSG
+- Reads as: ssg.ts
+- Neighbor files: ../../client/utils, ../hono, ../types, ../utils/concurrent, ../utils/mime, ./middleware.ts, ./plugins.ts, ./utils.ts
+- Safe summary: Core SSG implementation for fetching and saving route content as static files.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: dirname, normalizePath, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
+- Reads as: utils.ts
+- Neighbor files: ../hono, ../router, ../types, ../../utils/handler, ./middleware.ts
+- Safe summary: Utility functions for file path manipulation and route filtering for SSG.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY, AddedSSGDataRequest, ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, BeforeRequestHook, AfterResponseHook, AfterGenerateHook, ToSSGInterface, ToSSGAdaptorInterface, toSSG options
+- Reads as: middleware.ts
+- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../types, ./utils.ts
+- Safe summary: Middleware types and utilities for enabling/disabling SSG and passing data.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText, SSEMessage, SSEStreamingApi, StreamingApi
+- Reads as: index.ts (re-exports)
+- Neighbor files: ./stream.ts, ./sse.ts, ./text.ts
+- Safe summary: Streaming helper for streaming responses including SSE, text, and custom streams.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, StreamingApi, isOldBunVersion
+- Reads as: stream.ts
+- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../utils/stream, ./utils.ts
+- Safe summary: Core streaming API for progressive response delivery.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
+- Main exports or names: SSEMessage, SSEStreamingApi, streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, isOldBunVersion
+- Reads as: sse.ts
+- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../utils/html, ../utils/stream, ./utils.ts
+- Safe summary: Server-Sent Events stream implementation with message support.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Main exports or names: streamText
+- Reads as: text.ts
+- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../utils/stream, ./stream.ts
+- Safe summary: Text streaming helper for streaming plain text responses.
+
+## src/helper/accepts/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: accepts
+- Reads as: index.ts (re-exports)
+- Neighbor files: ./accepts.ts
+- Safe summary: Accepts helper for parsing Accept headers and finding matched content types.
+
+## src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
+- Main exports or names: Accept, acceptsConfig, accepts
